channel.title: Adnan Khan — Writing
channel.description: Deep-dives on agentic AI systems, platform engineering, and the future of DevOps by Adnan Khan.

item.title: The engineer who "just knows" is one resignation away. I built the fix.
item.author: adnan@adnankhan.me (Adnan Khan)
item.description: Why tribal knowledge disappears when engineers leave — and how retro-pilot turns every incident into a permanent, searchable lesson for the next team that hits the same problem.

item.title: I built a team of AI agents that fixes CI/CD failures while I sleep — here's what I learned about the future of DevOps.
item.author: adnan@adnankhan.me (Adnan Khan)
item.description: The architecture behind ops-pilot: how four coordinated agents detect failures, diagnose root cause, write the fix, and open a draft PR — without removing humans from the review loop. A case for agents as force multipliers, not replacements.

item.title: An autonomous agent that ships validated Terraform PRs in under 10 minutes — 3-5× faster than ChatGPT and Claude.
item.author: adnan@adnankhan.me (Adnan Khan)
item.description: The DuploCloud system in detail: 11 specialized skills, async execution on Kubernetes, NATS JetStream, AWS Bedrock. Built to remove humans from the execution loop — while keeping the review gate where it matters.
